title: Moderation update
body: Reviewed the current abuse queue with priority on high-severity reports. Actions taken: banned spam_wave_42 for phishing link spam across multiple channels; banned toxic_runner for repeated targeted harassment of newcomers. No sanction was applied to core_maintainer because the report was validated as a brigaded false positive, consistent with trusted-member protections. Closed the reviewed high-severity reports and stopping after this summary.
